name: Exaggeration: The 12 Basic Principles of Animation
snippet:
Exaggerating timing can have a terrific effect on everything from physical aspects to emotional aspects of the shot. As discussed in the ...
EXAGGERATION (see what I did there?) in animation is its own principle, but in many ways it can best be explained as how it can be applied to some of the other principles in order to breathe more life energy into the characters you’re creating, both physically and emotionally.

name: Exaggeration Principle (2026): Why Bigger Emotions Make Better
snippet: Exaggeration is a key animation principle that pushes emotion, timing, and poses beyond realism to tell more impactful stories.

name: EP 10 : Exaggeration Principle in Animation Animation
snippet: With this principle, an action, pose, emotion, or expression can be pushed to make it more appealing. You can see the best example of ...

name: What Is Exaggeration in Animation? - Beverly Boy Productions
snippet:
Exaggeration in animation is a fundamental principle that animators use to breathe life into their creations with energy and expression.
Explore the power of exaggeration in animation! Discover how this principle enhances emotion, storytelling, and character design.

name: Principles of Animation: Staging and Exaggeration | New Masters Academy
snippet: In this lesson, instructor Kathleen Quaife-Hodge will introduce you to the ninth and tenth principles of animation; staging and exaggeration.

name: Exaggeration Principle | Toon Boom Learn Portal
snippet: The principle of exaggeration is another important way of adding life in animation. Sticking exactly to reality will make for a very stiff animation.
